price: Was aber jemanden angeht, dem sein Buch hinter seinem Rücken gegeben wird,
arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهۡرِهِۦ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wa-ammā man ūtiya kitābahu warāa ẓahrihi
